reach_why: Mostly extends known worries about simplicity bias, underdetermination, and evaluator misspecification rather than opening new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links compression bias, hard-to-vary scoring, search priors, and human opacity into one failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing compressed versus messy-ground-truth domains; counterexamples weaken the claimed convergence distortion.
explanation: Concise evaluators can systematically prefer elegant falsehoods over messy truths under uncertain search and human-shaped criteria.
